name: commit-pr-conventions
description: Project conventions for writing git commit messages and pull request descriptions. Use this whenever composing or rewriting a commit message, running `git commit`, squashing/rebasing commits before opening or updating a PR, or creating/editing a pull request or its description (via `gh`, the GitHub API, or the web UI). Apply it even when the user only says things like "commit this", "push it", "open a PR", "update the PR", "clean up the commits", or "把这些提交合并一下" without explicitly mentioning conventions.
